regions.production: labelled <section> grid of shadcn Card tiles
Total tile (FG copy) — Card + info Badge
Overdue tile — Card + destructive Badge when > 0

deviations: Tile set follows the task contract (Total + by-status + Overdue = 5) vs prototype (Total/Complete/InProgress/Built = 4).
User-facing copy uses canonical FG term; legacy FA alias from the prototype is not reproduced (MON-domain-npd red-line).
Loading state owned by parent RSC Suspense boundary; not rendered by this island.
